# Data Models

This handbook groups the published SDK data contracts used in request and response payloads.

- Prefer these shapes when building TypeScript types or PowerShell request bodies.
- Included official SDK pages: `1416` across `154` grouped sections.

| [DataId](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | ID of the object that the logbook entry belongs to |
| [DataName](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | Name of the object that the logbook entry belongs to |
| [DataType](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | Data type of the object that the logbook entry belongs to |
| [Id](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | ID |
| [Info](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | Optionale additional info |
| [LogbookEvent](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | Logbook event (new, edited...) |
| [OrganisationUnit](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | Organisation unit that triggered the logbook entry |
| [OrganisationUnitId](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | ID of the organisation unit that triggered the logbook entry |
| [SyncOperation](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | Synchronisation State. Used to determine which operation to perform when synchronizing the data. |
| [TimeStampUtc](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | Timestamp |
| [TransactionId](#group-psrapi-data-psrlogbook) | The Id of the transaction. Used to identify the object in results, even if its id has changed.<br>Must be generated for sync operations. |

### PsrOptionDefaults.OfflineModeLockTimeout Field

Nach welchem Zeitraum eine synchronisierte Offlinedatenbank ihre Gültigkeit verliert.
Nach diesem Zeitraum kann der UserKey in der Registry nicht mehr entschlüsselt werden,
somit ist keine Verbindung zur Datenbank mehr möglich.

Namespace:
[PsrApi.Data](#group-psrapi-data)

#### Syntax

C#

```csharp
public const string OfflineModeLockTimeout = "OfflineModeLockTimeout"
```

###### Field Value

Type: String

[PsrOptionDefaults Class](#group-psrapi-data-psroptiondefaults)

[PsrApi.Data Namespace](#group-psrapi-data)
